query:
SELECT id, professor_name, project_title, university, major, created_at 
FROM project_matches 
WHERE university LIKE '%Yale%' AND major LIKE '%Chemical%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, professor_name, project_title, university, major, created_at 
FROM project_matches 
WHERE university LIKE '%Yale%' AND major LIKE '%Chemical%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
